name: Carrot Passion Layer Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350 degrees. Grease and flour three 9-inch cake pans.
Sift together flour, sugar, cinnamon, and baking soda; set aside.
Beat the oil, eggs, and grated carrots in a large bowl for 3-4 minutes.
Add the sifted ingredients; beat until smooth.
Fold in the crushed pineapple and chopped black walnuts. Pour into cake pans.
Bake for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Cool completely before frosting.
Icing:
3/4 cup Margarine
12 oz Cream cheese
6 cups Sifted Confectioner's sugar
1 teaspoon Vanilla extract
1 1/2 teaspoons Fresh Lemon juice
1 cup Shredded Coconut (for garnish)
Beat softened margarine and cream cheese until fluffy. Add confectioners' sugar, vanilla, and lemon juice; beat until smooth. Frost the cooled cakes and garnish with shredded coconut.
